faq.question: How do I view announcements?
faq.answer: To view announcements, click on 'Announcements' in the sidebar menu. You'll see all recent barangay announcements with details like titles, descriptions, dates, and images.

faq.question: What are emergency alerts?
faq.answer: Emergency alerts are urgent notifications about safety, weather, health advisories, or other critical information affecting the barangay. View them by clicking 'Emergency Alerts' in the sidebar.

faq.question: How do I check upcoming events?
faq.answer: Navigate to 'Events & Programs' from the sidebar. You'll see all upcoming barangay events and programs with dates, times, locations, and descriptions. You can also RSVP to events you'd like to attend.

faq.question: How do I check my verification status?
faq.answer: Your verification status is shown on your Profile page. If your account is pending verification, you'll see a 'Pending Verification' page. Once verified by an admin, you can access all system features.

faq.question: How do I update my profile?
faq.answer: Click on the 'Profile' button in the sidebar footer. From there you can view and update your personal information, profile picture, and account details.

faq.question: How do I register for an account?
faq.answer: Go to the iBayan Portal landing page and click 'Sign Up'. Fill in the registration form with your personal details, email, and password. After signing up, verify your email address and wait for admin verification of your account.

faq.question: What happens after I sign up?
faq.answer: After signing up, you'll receive an email verification link. Click the link to verify your email. Then, a barangay admin will review and verify your account. You'll have limited access until your account is fully verified.

faq.question: How do I reset my password?
faq.answer: On the login page, click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your registered email address, and you'll receive a password reset link via email.

faq.question: Why can't I access some features?
faq.answer: Some features like Emergency Alerts, Events, and the Dashboard require your account to be verified by a barangay admin. If your account is pending verification, you'll only have access to Announcements and your Profile page.

navigation.dashboard: The Dashboard (Home) is your main page showing recent announcements, emergency alerts, and quick access to main features. Click 'Home' in the sidebar.
navigation.announcements: The Announcements page displays all barangay announcements. Click 'Announcements' in the sidebar menu to navigate there.
navigation.emergency-alerts: Emergency Alerts shows urgent safety, weather, and health notifications. Click 'Emergency Alerts' in the sidebar. Requires verified account.
navigation.events: Events & Programs shows all upcoming barangay events, community programs, and activities. Click 'Events & Programs' in the sidebar. Requires verified account.
navigation.profile: Your Profile page shows your account information, verification status, and lets you edit your personal details. Click your profile icon at the bottom of the sidebar.

announcements.title: Managing Announcements
steps: Navigate to 'Announcements' from the admin sidebar
Click the 'Create Announcement' button
Fill in the title, description, and optional image
Click 'Publish' to make it visible to all residents
tips: You can edit or delete existing announcements

emergency_alerts.title: Managing Emergency Alerts
steps: Go to 'Emergency Alerts' from the admin sidebar
Click 'Create New Alert'
Select the alert category (e.g., Typhoon, Health, Flood, Utility)
Set the severity level (High, Medium, Low)
Enter the title, detailed description, and effective dates
Publish to notify all residents immediately
tips: Use High severity for critical and life-threatening alerts
Set appropriate effective dates so alerts auto-expire
Keep descriptions clear and actionable with specific instructions

resident_verification.title: Verifying Resident Accounts
steps: Navigate to 'Resident Verification' from the admin sidebar
You will see a list of pending resident registrations
Click on a resident to view their submitted details and documents
Review their information for accuracy
Click 'Approve' to verify the resident or 'Decline' to reject their application
A confirmation modal will appear before finalizing your decision
tips: Review all submitted documents carefully before approving
Declined residents can re-submit their application
Verified residents gain full access to all portal features

events.title: Managing Events & Programs
steps: Navigate to 'Events & Programs' from the admin sidebar
Click 'Create Event' to add a new event
Fill in the event title, description, date, time, and location
Add an optional image for the event
Click 'Save' or 'Publish' to make the event visible to residents
tips: You can edit or delete events after creation

admin_accounts.title: Managing Admin Accounts
steps: Navigate to 'Admin Accounts' from the admin sidebar
View a list of all current admin accounts
Use the 'Add Admin' button to create a new admin account
Fill in the admin's email and set access credentials
You can also remove existing admin accounts if needed
tips: Only add trusted personnel as admins
Each admin has full access to all management features
Keep the number of admin accounts minimal for security

dashboard.title: Using the Admin Dashboard
steps: The Admin Dashboard is your overview page
View key metrics like total residents, pending verifications, and active alerts
Use the quick-action cards to navigate to management pages
Monitor recent activity and system statistics
tips: Check the dashboard regularly for pending tasks
Use KPI cards for a quick health check of the system
